blockingIssues.description: Traceability writes are unsynchronized read-modify-write operations, so concurrent writes can lose entries (fails VAL-TRACE-006 intent).
Concurrency test asserts only that at least one entry remains, codifying lossy behavior instead of requiring all concurrent writes to persist.
Coverage linked/unlinked counts use entry count instead of link-presence semantics, so specs with empty links can be reported as linked.
Auto-link reruns keep stale links when file paths change; changed outputs are not replaced/marked as stale as required.
Auto-link mapping only uses related_specs and does not map entity refs from task context.
Traceability page reads /api/project response at wrong path (`data.git_remote` vs `data.project.git_remote`), so GitHub file links are typically not generated.
Cross-flow verification did not test traceability UI empty-state rendering directly; only API empty payload behavior was validated.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to reflect that traceability page now exists, ER page remains pending, and traceability API routes are /api/traceability.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify `Use Bropilot.Map.Store for map data` with explicit exceptions for traceability-level aggregate operations (atomic file writes and multi-file coverage reads), or require wrappers in Map.Store for those scenarios.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both traceability-data-model and traceability-api used direct File/Yaml operations and triggered convention ambiguity in reviews.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add stricter requirement that handoff `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` must be false when transcript shows implementation-before-tests for TDD steps, with explicit deviation notes required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both traceability-data-model and traceability-auto-linkage reviews observed production code creation before RED tests while handoff claimed no deviation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify minimum test expectations for interactive Alpine pages and require API contract-path checks when page-local fetch logic is used.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: traceability-ui introduced response-shape mismatch in /api/project handling and had no new tests for the new interaction logic.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require UI assertions for UI-facing acceptance criteria; API-only validation should not satisfy UI empty-state requirements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-cross-flows validated empty-state via API but not via /traceability/ UI despite expected behavior requiring graceful UI empty state.

rejectedObservations.observation: Hardcoded /blob/main/ branch in traceability links should trigger immediate guidance update.
rejectedObservations.reason: non-blocking and feature-specific; handled as normal implementation fix, not broad guidance.
